what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a specific board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter and no body content.
It declares attachment id att-2bcb4b37, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, and target board://item-12539114.
An ISO-8601 added timestamp is present.
No symbols are defined in the file.
standouts: The target is expressed as a board:// URI pointing to item-12539114.
The attachment type is board_items, indicating a channel-to-board-item linkage.
The file is purely structural metadata with no explanatory payload.
conventions: Follows the att-<uuid>.md naming convention under channel-memory/channel_attachments.
Uses YAML front matter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Represents external targets with a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: The file contains no human-readable description of why the board item is attached.
The target board item content is not included or summarized here.
There is no author or modification history beyond a single added timestamp.
notes: A bare attachment record that ties a board item to the dragnet-development channel with only metadata and a timestamp.
questions: What content does board item item-12539114 contain?
Why was this board item attached to the dragnet-development channel?
Who created the attachment and is it still current?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — the file is metadata with no separate stated purpose beyond the fields it records.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a persistent, timestamped reference from a channel to a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved or audited later.
novelty: n/a — a routine channel attachment metadata record.
contribution: Provides a channel-to-board-item linkage and a provenance timestamp that a fused system can use to correlate dragnet-development channel activity with the referenced board item.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML metadata record for channel attachment att-2bcb4b37 in the dragnet-development channel, declaring a board_items attachment to board item item-12539114 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to persistently associate a specific board item with the dragnet-development channel.
